attestation_note: Three errors corrected: Avo Automation end date was extracted as July 2024 instead of the correct June 2024; SwiftHire project link (bit.ly/4bHTqI8) was stale/wrong and replaced with the live link (swifthire-board.vercel.app); resume summary said 'early-stage team' which conflicted with profile.yml's stated growth-stage (Series A-C) target — resolved in favor of early-stage as the real target and corrected profile.yml to match.
summary: Product Manager who ships AI products end to end. 4 years owning roadmaps, leading engineers, and turning ambiguous problems into features people actually use. Built and deployed multi-agent AI systems outside of work. Graduating August 2026, looking to join an early-stage team where the problems are hard and the pace is fast.

experience.title: Research Assistant
highlights: Reached 85% prediction accuracy on patient falls and hospitalizations by building an agentic monitoring system pulling real-time data from 5+ wearables

experience.title: Product Analyst Co-op
highlights: Reduced manual analysis time by 60% by building an AI agent that let the product team query data in plain English instead of writing SQL every time
Defined 50+ feature-level KPIs and built a full pipeline from raw data to leadership dashboards, giving the team a single source of truth for roadmap decisions
Analyzed 100+ engagement metrics using Heap Analytics to surface adoption gaps and recommend where to focus next
experience.verifiable_via: Offer letter / co-op placement record, LinkedIn

experience.title: Product Engineer -> Senior Product Engineer
highlights: Cut manual effort by 90% by leading AI enablement across the product: identified the biggest friction points in the user journey, defined the roadmap, and shipped it with 6 engineers and 2 designers
Grew the customer base by 33% by working directly with prospects to understand their use cases, shaping pricing and product strategy around what actually moved deals forward
Reduced churn by 50% by staying close to customers, gathering feedback across 100+ features, and closing gaps fast enough to change minds before they left
Drove 15% revenue growth in 6 months by keeping a high shipping cadence across 50+ features and fixes, without letting quality slip
experience.verifiable_via: Former manager reference, LinkedIn employment history

projects.name: Nourish Agent
highlights: Defined and shipped a chat-first AI nutritionist that pulls live wearable data in the background and adapts recommendations in real time, no manual logging required

Architected a multi-agent system on n8n where nutrition, scheduling, and health monitoring run as isolated agents, each improvable without touching the others. Integrated Google Fitness, Gmail, Google Calendar, and Supabase via MCP

projects.name: SwiftHire
highlights: Surveyed 100+ jobseekers, found 10 concrete inefficiencies in the application process, and built 3 AI-powered features to fix them: auto-fill, real-time document tailoring, and bulk applying
Cut manual effort by 80% and application time by 25% across active users
